Landing.heroSubtitle: Complete lessons, earn soulbound XP tokens, and collect verifiable credential NFTs on Solana.

learningPaths.title: Learning Paths
learningPaths.subtitle: Structured curricula from beginner to advanced.

features.title: Why Superteam Academy?
features.subtitle: Real on-chain mechanics, not just completion badges.

testimonials.title: Loved by Learners
testimonials.subtitle: Join hundreds of developers building on Solana.

fundamentals.title: Solana Fundamentals
fundamentals.description: Accounts, programs, and the transaction model.

anchor.title: Anchor Framework
anchor.description: Build programs fast with macros, IDL, and type safety.

defi.title: DeFi on Solana
defi.description: SPL tokens, AMMs, liquidity pools, and more.

earnXp.title: Earn Soulbound XP
earnXp.description: Lesson completions mint Token-2022 XP to your wallet as on-chain proof of learning.

credentials.title: Collect Credentials
credentials.description: Finish a course and claim a verifiable Metaplex Core credential NFT.

progress.title: Track Progress On-Chain
progress.description: Progress is anchored to Solana so your learning history is portable and verifiable.

developerContent.title: Real Developer Content
developerContent.description: Write Solana code in the browser, run tests, and submit challenges.

connectWallet.title: Connect Wallet
connectWallet.desc: Use Phantom, Solflare, or any Solana wallet on devnet.

enrollLearn.title: Enroll and Learn
enrollLearn.desc: Pick a course, write code in the browser, and pass tests.

earnOnchain.title: Earn On-Chain
earnOnchain.desc: Soulbound XP and a verifiable credential NFT are minted to you.

ana.name: Ana Souza
ana.quote: On-chain credentials changed how I present my skills. Recruiters can verify instantly.

carlos.name: Carlos Mendes
carlos.quote: The in-browser playground lets me practice Anchor without extra setup.

beatriz.name: Beatriz Lima
beatriz.quote: I went from zero Solana knowledge to deploying my first program with confidence.

lucas.name: Lucas Martins
lucas.quote: The lesson flow mirrors real workflows. I shipped my first Anchor project in a weekend.

marina.name: Marina Costa
marina.quote: Having XP, credentials, and progress in one place made my learning streak much easier to keep.

rafael.name: Rafael Pereira
rafael.quote: Challenge feedback is fast and practical, so I can iterate quickly and keep momentum.

superteam.body: Superteam Academy is an open-source learning platform built by Superteam Brasil for the next wave of Solana developers across Latin America.

newsletter.title: Stay in the loop
newsletter.subtitle: New courses, challenges, and community highlights straight to your inbox.

finalCta.title: Start Earning On-Chain Today
finalCta.subtitle: Connect your wallet and enroll in your first course in under a minute.
